release_notes: **"Export for YunPrint" now supports splitting** the output into multiple files in one click. After Generate, the Export button opens a small dialog asking how to split:; **Single file** (legacy behaviour) — one combined `.txt`; **Split by Part Type** (default — most common request) — one file per JK / D.D / ORG-Service-Pack / Battery / etc., so each goes to its own sticker template / roll
